title: T-014 — QA-010 Holds list page (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-014 — QA-010 Holds list page

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-010, §8.5 prototype holds_list, §11.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/holds` Server Component listing active holds with filters (status, priority, reason, reference_type, date range), columns Hold# | Type | Reference | Reason | Priority badge | Status | Days held | Estimated release | Actions, Create Hold button, empty state.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/holds/page.tsx` Server Component reads listActiveHolds(filters from search params).
2. shadcn Table for the rows; Filter bar with shadcn Select + Input + DatePicker.
3. Row click → /quality/holds/:id; quick-release shortcut visible only to quality_lead.
4. 1:1 prototype parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:3-161` (holds_list).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/holds/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldsListTable.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/HoldsFilterBar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/holdsList.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:3-161, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (top filter bar with status/priority/reason/reference_type/date Selects + Create Hold button, table with 9 columns in fixed order Hold#/Type/Reference/Reason/Priority/Status/DaysHeld/EstRelease/Actions), visuals (shadcn Table/Select/Badge/Button only, priority Badge variant maps low=secondary, medium=default, high=warning, critical=destructive), and interaction (row click navigates to /quality/holds/:id, Create Hold opens hold_create modal, quick-release action visible only to quality_lead) — verified by RTL test plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given listActiveHolds returns 0 rows, when the page renders, then the empty-state shows 'No active holds — click Create Hold to report an issue.' and the Create Hold button is enabled
3. Given filter status=open and priority=critical applied via search params, when the page renders, then the table shows only matching rows and the URL persists those params for shareable links

pipeline_inputs.description: QA-010 holds list page with filter bar + 9-column shadcn Table + Create Hold button + role-aware quick-release.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component fetches listActiveHolds(filters) from T-010 and renders shadcn Table with 9 columns matching prototype design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:3-161. Filter bar uses shadcn Select + DatePicker (no native HTML controls). Priority Badge variants per parity checklist. Empty-state copy from §8.2. Quick-release row action hidden for non-quality_lead. URL search params persist filters. Honor translation notes from prototype-index entry holds_list.
out_of_scope: Do not implement audit trail PDF download from row (P2)
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/holds-screens.jsx:3-161, then it matches the prototype on structural parity (filter bar with 5 Selects + Create Hold button, 9-column Table in declared order), visual parity (shadcn Table/Select/Badge/Button only, priority Badge variant maps per checklist), and interaction parity (row click → /quality/holds/:id, Create Hold opens modal, quick-release visible only to quality_lead) — verified by RTL test plus the parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given listActiveHolds returns 0 rows, when the page renders, then the empty-state copy 'No active holds — click Create Hold to report an issue.' is shown and Create Hold button stays enabled
Given URL search params status=open and priority=critical, when the page renders, then the table contains only matching rows and the params persist on reload
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/holds/__tests__/holdsList.test.tsx asserting column order, empty state, role-based action hide, URL filter persistence
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML <select> (must use shadcn Select per translation notes)
Do not show quick-release to non-quality_lead users
Do not lose filter state on navigation
